text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since I ran in such a big racing
goal of mine! I've been waiting almost half a year
for this moment!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm not the same racer I was when I made my
debut, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've grown a ton—in fact, you can call me El
Condor Superfantástica!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that she's improved significantly since her
last big race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our major goal to win the Japan Cup in El Condor
Pasa's classic year starts now.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And on top of that, my raw strength isn't the only
thing that's gotten way stronger!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
There's one more thing that's got stronger too!
Annnd thaaat's...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You can do it, El! Get 'em!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno, Spe! The support from all my friends has
more than doubled too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Over the past six months, my friendships have
grown tougher than steel and hotter than
fire—hot enough to set my heart ablaze!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Elll! We're skipping dinner if you don't put on
a good race!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Grass! We're not skippin' anything! Not
dinner or runnin'!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You see, Trainer? When I've got friends and fans
cheering me on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Millions might be a bit of an exaggeration, but...
choice_data_list:
All right, then. Why don't you show me what
you got?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh? It sounds like you're doubting me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's all right. Prepare to feast your eyes...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
As I turn into a real condor and cut straight
through Tokyo Racecourse!
